title: facebook/astryx
friendlyTitle: Astryx: Meta’s open design system for people and AI agents
summary: Astryx is Meta’s open-source, agent-ready React design system with accessible components, theming, CLI tooling, templates, and documentation designed for both humans and AI coding assistants.
friendlySummary: Astryx is an open-source React design system with components, themes, templates, and tools. It is built to be easy for both developers and AI coding agents to use.
whyItMatters: Product teams can use Astryx to scaffold consistent interfaces faster while giving AI agents a well-documented component system to work from instead of inventing UI patterns ad hoc.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to build consistent app interfaces faster, especially if an AI assistant is helping write the frontend code.
